name: Contagion
description: Your touch inflicts a disease. Make a melee spell attack against a creature within reach. On a hit, you afflict the creature with a disease of your choice from the list below. At the end of each of the target's turns, the target makes a Constitution saving throw. After three failed saves, the disease lasts for the duration, and the creature stops making these saves. After three successful saves, the creature recovers from the disease, and the spell ends. Blinding Sickness: The creature has Disadvantage on Wisdom checks and Wisdom saving throws, and the creature has the Blinded condition. Filth Fever: The creature has Disadvantage on Strength checks, Strength saving throws, and attack rolls that use Strength. Flesh Rot: The creature has Disadvantage on Charisma checks and is Vulnerable to all damage. Mindfire: The creature has Disadvantage on Intelligence checks and Intelligence saving throws, and the creature behaves as if under the effects of the Confusion spell during combat. Seizure: The creature has Disadvantage on Dexterity checks, Dexterity saving throws, and attack rolls that use Dexterity. Slimy Doom: The creature has Disadvantage on Constitution checks and Constitution saving throws, and the creature has the Stunned condition whenever it takes damage.
